title: chore(deps): update build tools
summary: Automated Renovate PR bumping @types/node from 22.19.13 to 22.19.15 across 104 package.json files and associated pnpm-lock.yaml files. This is a recurring pattern of build tool dependency updates managed by Renovate.
maintainerNotes: PR has merge conflicts and CI failures (Agent Builder, Core, Observability tests failing; E2E and Memory tests still pending). The approval is only from github-actions bot, not a human reviewer. Renovate has flagged that it won't auto-rebase because it detected non-Renovate commits. Needs a rebase to resolve conflicts before it can proceed. Previous identical Renovate build-tools PRs have been regularly merged without issues.
